name: sample_suite
description: Minimal pilot task suite for verifying the data flywheel end-to-end. Two near-identical hello-world tasks; one is intended to succeed and one to fail, so that the reward signal can be observed to actually distinguish them.

tasks.prompt: Create a Python file named hello.py at the project root that prints exactly the string: hello
Create a Python file named hello.py at the project root that prints exactly the string: hello
